title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly autonomous in code generation, review, experimentation, and AI system development, representing early-stage AI self-improvement. Both Anthropic and OpenAI are raising concerns about accelerating AI development and calling for coordinated governance measures to manage emerging risks.
